title: Project Engineer (Mechanical and Electrical) #HAC
description:
Job scope:

  • Support lead engineer with task including site survey, procurement support, Inspections, reviews of vendor documents and related works.

  • Coordinating with various stakeholders for design and procurement works

  • Assist approval of design document from client.

  • Any other ad-hoc works assigned by project manager and lead engineer.

  • Manage and coordinate project works as assigned by lead engineer and project manager.

  • Coordinate with management, team members, vendors, contractors, and client representatives.

  • Update and report to management team.

Assist and support the site supervisor and construction manager in all aspects of works, including:

  • Planning and scheduling work

  • Assigning work to sub-contractors and overseeing their work.

  • Ensuring compliance with standards, codes, and safety regulations.

  • Developing reports and records

  • Maintaining accurate records and documentation.

Perform routine tasks, such as:

  • Conducting pre-task Toolbox Meeting/ Safety briefings.

  • Issuing work permits.

  • Associated QA/QC works and WHS works.

  • Arranging materials and equipment.

  • Arranging special tools etc

T&C works

  • Communicating effectively with the site supervisor, project manager, other subcontractors, and inspectors.

  • Any other ad-hoc works assigned by project manager and construction manager.

Interested candidates, please send in your resume to anna.chen@recruitexpress.com.sg

Anna Chen jiaxin

CEI No: R25157621

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
